'''Yang Metal Horse''' is the 7th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 庚 Kanoe (yang metal, the gaia-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 午 Uma, the [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's fire overcomes the stem's metal, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Earth Snake]] (node 6) and [[Yin Metal Goat]] (node 8).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoe (庚)]] — yang metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse (午)]] — yang fire
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Earth Snake]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Metal Goat]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062141}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
